name: 001_basic_file_copy.sh
expected: destination file has the source content

name: 002_multiple_sources_to_directory.sh
expected: a source file is copied under the target directory

name: 003_target_directory_option.sh
stderr:
/bin/cp: illegal option -- t
usage: cp [-R [-H | -L | -P]] [-fi | -n] [-aclpSsvXx] source_file target_file
       cp [-R [-H | -L | -P]] [-fi | -n] [-aclpSsvXx] source_file ... target_directory
target-directory copy failed
expected: source is copied into the specified target directory

name: 004_no_target_directory_error.sh
expected: copy fails when DEST is an existing directory

name: 005_recursive_one_file_system_copy.sh
exercises: -R recursive copy with -x, --one-file-system on same filesystem
expected: nested regular file is present in copied directory tree

name: 006_archive_preserves_symlink.sh
expected: symlink inside copied tree remains a symlink

name: 007_attributes_only_empty_data.sh
stderr:
/bin/cp: illegal option -- -
usage: cp [-R [-H | -L | -P]] [-fi | -n] [-aclpSsvXx] source_file target_file
       cp [-R [-H | -L | -P]] [-fi | -n] [-aclpSsvXx] source_file ... target_directory
attributes-only copy failed
expected: destination exists with zero bytes of data

name: 008_link_hardlink_instead_of_copy.sh
stderr:
stat: illegal option -- c
usage: stat [-FLnq] [-f format | -l | -r | -s | -x] [-t timefmt] [file ...]
stat: illegal option -- c
usage: stat [-FLnq] [-f format | -l | -r | -s | -x] [-t timefmt] [file ...]
expected: destination and source have the same inode

name: 009_symbolic_link_instead_of_copy.sh
expected: destination is a symlink pointing at the source path

name: 010_no_dereference_copies_symlink.sh
expected: destination is a symlink with the same referent

name: 011_dereference_copies_referent.sh
expected: destination is regular file containing referent data

name: 012_follow_command_line_symlink.sh
exercises: -H follows command-line symbolic links in SOURCE
expected: destination is a regular copy of the command-line symlink referent

name: 013_d_preserves_hardlink_relationship.sh
stderr:
/bin/cp: illegal option -- d
usage: cp [-R [-H | -L | -P]] [-fi | -n] [-aclpSsvXx] source_file target_file
       cp [-R [-H | -L | -P]] [-fi | -n] [-aclpSsvXx] source_file ... target_directory
-d copy failed
expected: copied hard-linked sources remain hard-linked to each other

name: 014_p_preserves_timestamps.sh
stderr:
stat: illegal option -- c
usage: stat [-FLnq] [-f format | -l | -r | -s | -x] [-t timefmt] [file ...]
stat: illegal option -- c
usage: stat [-FLnq] [-f format | -l | -r | -s | -x] [-t timefmt] [file ...]
expected: destination mtime equals source mtime

preserve mode copy failed
expected: destination mode matches the source mode despite restrictive umask

name: 021_no_clobber_skips_existing.sh
